description: Real Loop user data: BG 234 (flat), IOB 3.6U, high temp basals for correction
notes: Already significant IOB (3.6U) from prior corrections
Good test case for algorithm comparison

data_gaps_context.description: deviceStatus may have gaps when Loop fails to complete a cycle
data_gaps_context.handling: CLI shows 'NS observed: (no data)' for time slots without matching deviceStatus
data_gaps_context.example_failure: pumpManagerError["detail": "communication", "error": "Pump did not respond in time"]
